overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walkthrough of a neon-lit nightclub, exiting into a rainy cyberpunk red-light district street, and entering a second intimate lounge. The scene features heavy pink, purple, and cyan neon lighting, wet reflective streets, and dense urban cyberpunk architecture with Japanese signage.

events.description: approaches the bar counter while moving past standing patrons

agents.ego_description: walking through the neon-lit nightclub from the pole area toward the bar, observing the interior

notable_agents.action: patron in white shirt standing near the stripper pole
bartender behind the counter serving drinks

entered.detail: illuminated metal pole on a circular raised platform
bright pink neon sign with triple X lettering
large neon sign combining male and female symbols in pink and blue
long illuminated bar with purple neon underlighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens inside a cyberpunk nightclub with vibrant pink and purple neon lighting. The camera moves from a central stripper pole area toward a long illuminated bar counter, passing standing patrons. A large gender symbol neon sign dominates the left wall while an XXX sign glows on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: nightclub interior transitioning to street exit

events.description: turns away from the bar and walks toward the club exit doorway
exits the nightclub into the rainy neon-lit street with wet pavement

agents.ego_description: turning away from the bar and walking toward the exit, passing other patrons near the doorway

notable_agents.action: patron in red jacket standing near the exit doorway

entered.detail: doorway leading out to the street with visible neon lights outside
red paper lanterns hanging above the street entrance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns away from the bar and moves toward the club exit, transitioning from the enclosed interior to the doorway. The lighting shifts from pure neon to mixed street lighting as the exit approaches, revealing wet streets and hanging red lanterns outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk red-light district street with neon storefronts

events.description: wet pavement creates strong reflections of neon signs from the street
turns left down the street passing various storefronts and advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking down the wet neon-lit street, navigating past pedestrians and observing storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in yellow shirt standing near a vending machine

entered.detail: rain-slicked asphalt reflecting pink and cyan neon lights
bright red neon sign reading SEX SHOP above a doorway
orange automated machine with glowing interface
multiple external AC units mounted on the building wall
large vertical poster with anime-style character and NICOLA branding

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through a narrow cyberpunk alley with wet streets reflecting intense neon signage. Various storefronts including a sex shop and vending machines line the right side, while pedestrians walk through the misty atmosphere. The environment features dense urban architecture with hanging red lanterns and multiple air conditioning units.

scene_state.functional_zone: intimate neon lounge with heart-shaped signage

events.description: enters the second establishment with large heart-shaped neon signage
turns to survey the lounge area with seated patrons on white couches

agents.ego_description: entering the lounge and moving past seated patrons toward the back seating area

notable_agents.action: patron sitting on white couch near the wall

entered.detail: large pink neon heart with love script inside, mounted on the back wall
modern white lounge seating arranged against the walls
vertical blue banners with stylized graphics hanging on the wall
sparkling curtain doorway leading to another room

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a second, more intimate lounge dominated by a large pink heart-shaped neon sign. The space features white couches with seated patrons, poster banners on the walls, and a beaded curtain doorway. The lighting shifts to warmer red and pink tones compared to the previous blue-cyan street lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit nightclub through a rainy urban alleyway and into an intimate lounge. It begins inside the club, gliding past a central stripper pole and standing patrons toward an illuminated bar counter flanked by glowing gender and XXX signs. As the camera turns away from the bar and moves toward the exit, the enclosed neon interior gives way to the mixed street lighting and hanging red lanterns of the outdoors. The scene then expands into a narrow, misty alley where wet streets reflect intense signage from vending machines and storefronts before the camera turns toward a second entrance. Finally, the environment shifts from the blue-cyan tones of the street into a warmer red and pink lounge featuring a large heart-shaped neon sign, white couches, and a beaded curtain doorway.
